title: sargentodoxa cuneata
intro: Sargentodoxa cuneata, also known as the Chinese bloodwort or Wheeler's fritillaria, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Sargentodoxa cuneata is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
